archetype: 1 (Organic & Earthy) blended with 4 (Swiss & High-Contrast for Typography)

brand.name: TaxNext.in
brand.tone: Premium, serious, modern, readable, trustworthy, CA-firm

heading.usage: H1-H6, authoritative hero text, key section titles. Use tracking-tight.

body.usage: Highly readable body copy, UI elements, forms, tables, helper text.

rules: Accent color used sparingly. Avoid full-screen green backgrounds.

spacing_and_layout.rhythm: Wide breathing room between sections (py-16 to py-24). Avoid dense layouts.
spacing_and_layout.mobile: Do not place too many features in one row. Full-width inputs. Labels above fields.
spacing_and_layout.forms: Short, progressive disclosure. h-12 inputs on mobile, h-10 on desktop.

buttons.height: Generous on mobile (h-12). Standard on desktop (h-10).

cards.shadow: Soft shadows only (shadow-sm, shadow-md). No harsh dropshadows.

tables.readability: Highly readable with clear row separation (border-b).

badges.style: Subtle, not loud. bg-muted text-muted-foreground or very light green.

states.focus: Visible focus states for keyboard users (ring-2 ring-primary ring-offset-2)
states.feedback: Error, warning, success states must be calm and legible (e.g., muted red, soft amber, forest green).

visual_enhancers.shadows: Soft only. Avoid deep or neon shadows.
visual_enhancers.radius: Medium (rounded-md/lg). No pill-shaped cards unless specific badge.
visual_enhancers.icons: Simple, elegant icon style (Lucide React or Phosphor Icons Duotone).
visual_enhancers.motion: Subtle transitions (transition-colors duration-200, simple accordion). NO flashy effects.

anti_patterns: No flashy effects or heavy animations.
Avoid dense layouts and cramped spacing.
No labels next to inputs on mobile (must be stacked).

media.instructions_to_main_agent: Use these precise image URLs. Do not use placeholders.

image_urls.description: Professional desk with tax forms and laptop.

instructions_to_main_agent: Implement this design system by relying heavily on the updated tailwind.config.js and index.css tokens. Adhere to the typography pairing: Playfair Display for headings and Inter for body text. Enforce clear focus states with 'focus-visible:ring-2 focus-visible:ring-ring' and use generous padding/spacing.
